events.text: Muhammad Ali refused induction into the United States Army in Houston, Texas.
The mutiny on HMS Bounty took place in the South Pacific.
Dennis Tito became the first space tourist on Soyuz TM-32 launching from Baikonur, Kazakhstan.
Thor Heyerdahl set sail on the Kon-Tiki raft from Callao, Peru.

deaths.text: Benito Mussolini, Italian dictator, was killed in northern Italy.
